name: react-native-multi-tv-app-sample
description: 📺🚀 React Native TV app sample for  Android TV, Fire TV (Fire OS and Vega OS), tvOS, and web. Features customizable drawer navigation 🗂️, content grid 🖼️, hero header 🦸‍♂️, and video player 🎥. Built with Expo. Perfect starter for cross-platform TV app development! 🌟
